titleStmt.title: SII 9.244: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 244. (A.R. No. 211 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR LYING NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BADA, A HAMLET OF BENNEHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the 7th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Raktākshi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1144 July 16, when there was a lunar eclipse. A certain Pubbarasa is said to have made a grant of some land and a maṭha for the service of the god Noṇambēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samattapraśastisahita śrīmajjagadēka
malladēvara vijayarājyamu
tara(ṣi)pravarddhamanamacaṁdrarkkataraṁbaraṁ
salutamire yēḷaneya rakkatakṣisaṁva
charada prathamaṣaḍaśrāvaṇada hūṇnave
sōmagrahaṇaṁ pa hariharadēvara
dalu noṇaṁbēśvaradēvarige kalidēva
matu bagara Ūraḍeya
ra magaṁ pubbarasa
ga

bāgadalu biṭṭa maṭha ha(ṁ)
nneraḍu kayyu nela paṇaṁ Ī dharmma
vaṁ Āvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁ
vāraṇāsikurukṣētraArghghyatī
rttadali caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhma
ṇarige sāyira kavileya Ubhaya
mukhige koṭṭa phalavakku I dharmmavana
ḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsikurukṣētradali
sāyira kavileyumaṁ sāyira brā
hmaṇarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpāta
kanakku svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭirvvariṣasahasrā
ṇāṁ Iṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Intī dharmmamaṁ māḍisida dēvara
paṁḍitaruṁ Ācaṁdrārkkataraṁba
saluvudu .
Digital edition of SII 9.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
